title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 4 of 1994
text: ut- INDIA • MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH AND EDUCATION Central Agricultural University, Imphal (Manipur) ORDINANCE Imphal, the 23rd June, 1994 No. 4 or 1994 No. VC:CA U:14(ESTABLIS).193: Whereas the Go% ernment of India in the Department of Agricultural Research and Education/Indian Council of Agricultural Research has approved to make an Ordinance regarding the medium of instruction and examination or students in various courses in the,Central Agricultural University, Imphal vide letter No. F.I-24( III/Edn. II dated the 14th June. 1994. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) read with clause (c) of sub-section ( I ) of section 27 of the Central Agricultural University Act. 1992 (40 of 1992);and with• the previous approval of the Central Government, as aforesaid, I. the Vice-Chancellor of the Central Agricultural University, Imphal, do iereby make the first Ordinance and notify that English Shall be the medium of ristruction and examination in all Under-Graduate and Post-Graduate Courses, in the 7.ehtral Agricultural University, Imphal. (M.P. Singh) Vice-Chancellor, Central Agricultural University, Imphal -- 1 of 2 -- No. VC.'CAU!l4(ESTAEELIS),93• Imphal, the 23rd June, 1994 Copy for information and necessary action to: I. The Registrar, Central Agricultural University, Imphal (Manipur) 2. The Principal, College of Agriculture, Central Agricultural University, Imphal (Manipur) 3. Chief Secretary, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh/Manipur/ Meghalaya/Mizoram/Sikkim/Tripura 4. The Secretary, North-Eastern Council, Shillong (Meghalaya) 5. Dy. Director General (Edn.), Krishi Anusandhan Bhavan, Pusa Gate, New Delhi - 12 . 6. Jt. Secretary (DARE)/Secy., ICAR, Krishi Bhavan, New Delhi . (M.P. Singh) Vice-Chancellor, Central Agricultural University, Imphal -- 2 of 2 --
